summary: Iteration 3 complete: date-range filter on /transactions screen verified end-to-end. Backend (9/9 pytest tests pass on /app/backend/tests/test_iter3_range.py): GET /api/transactions correctly handles start, end, start+end, start+search+type combos, and 401s when unauthenticated. Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport, after signup → navigate /transactions): all 6 range chips render with correct testIDs (range-all, range-today, range-7d, range-30d, range-month, range-custom); tapping a preset (e.g., range-7d) refetches and highlights the active chip; range-custom opens a modal with range-start-input, range-end-input, range-apply, range-clear; invalid input handled — 'Start must be before end' shown for start>end (modal stays open), 'Enter at least one date' shown for bad/empty input; applying a valid YYYY-MM-DD range closes the modal, sets the custom chip label to '01-01 → 12-31' (MM-DD → MM-DD format) and refetches; tapping range-all resets the chip back to 'Custom' label and clears filters; combined search 'food' + filter expense + range-30d applies cleanly without crash; modal Clear button also resets to All. No backend changes needed this iteration. No bugs found.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver fallback warning persists on web — harmless (carried from prior iters).

action_items: None blocking. Optional: persist last-selected range across navigations (currently resets on screen unmount since state is local).
Optional: also accept 'YYYY-MM-DD' partial-day inputs more leniently (currently empty start with non-empty bad end shows 'Enter at least one date' which is technically misleading).
critical_code_review_comments: transactions.tsx fmtDate/parseDate are defined inline; consider moving to a shared util if used elsewhere.
Backend list_transactions uses $lte for end which can include the boundary millisecond; the frontend already sets end to 23:59:59.999 — fine, but consider documenting.
Custom chip label uses fmtDate(...).slice(5) which works for YYYY-MM-DD but would silently break if fmtDate format ever changes; safer to extract MM-DD via getMonth/getDate.
seed_data_creation: Per-run throwaway user via /api/auth/register (uuid-suffixed email) + 4 transactions across distinct dates (today, 5d, 20d, 60d ago). Cleaned up by fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 added a date-range picker on /transactions only. Backend already supported start/end query params; no server-side changes were made this iter. Public URL: https://smooth-spend.preview.emergentagent.com. To re-run all suites: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` (expect 18 iter1 + 17 iter2 + 9 iter3 = 44 tests). Frontend testIDs verified this round: transactions-screen, range-all, range-today, range-7d, range-30d, range-month, range-custom, range-start-input, range-end-input, range-apply, range-clear, search-input, filter-all/expense/income. Custom chip label format = MM-DD → MM-DD when a range is set; reverts to 'Custom' on reset.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
